footer.tagline: Discover, organise, and share films and series — smart lists, social activity, and AI tools in one cinematic workspace.
footer.trustLead: Built for people who take cinema seriously.
footer.trustBody: Browse, watchlists, reviews, recommendations, and lists in one flow. Your account lives on CinePhix; catalogue metadata is delivered through industry-standard film APIs.
footer.tmdbAttribution: This product uses the TMDB API but is not endorsed or certified by TMDB.
footer.newsletterHint: Release notes and curated picks — no spam. Full subscription controls when we go live.
footer.newsletterThanks: Thanks — you’ll hear from us when the newsletter ships.
footer.creditsHtml: Engineering by Adrián Vázquez
